title: Fastify server bootstrap, lifecycle, and origin-guard middleware
acceptance_criteria: GET /health returns 200 OK with JSON { status: 'ok' }
@fastify/websocket and @fastify/static plugins registered (bun add @fastify/static added to package.json + bun.lock updated)

origin-guard.ts onRequest hook rejects requests with Origin or Host header not in allowlist: ['http://localhost:3000', 'http://localhost:5173', 'http://127.0.0.1:3000']; returns 403 for disallowed origins
startApiServer() exported from src/api/index.ts; called from main() in src/index.ts after runMigrations()
Fastify app reference stored at module level for shutdown
shutdown() in src/index.ts updated to: stopTradingLoop() → connectionManager.closeAll() → Promise.race([app.close(), timeout(5000)]) → closeRedis() → closePool() → process.exit(0)
TypeScript strict mode — no any, no ts-ignore
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
